description_long: This is a modern, three-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a paved lot. The exterior features a combination of reddish-brown brickwork and large glass windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. Balconies with glass railings are present on the first and second floors, adding outdoor living space and architectural interest. One side of the house has an external staircase enclosed by vertical metal slats, offering access to upper levels. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some variation for balconies and stair access. The main entryway is located on the ground floor, featuring a double glass door beneath a small overhang.
description: A modern, three-story brick house with large glass windows, balconies, and an external staircase. The flat roof and clean lines give it a contemporary urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large glass windows, and two balconies with glass railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, symmetrical window arrangement, and the vertical slat enclosure for the staircase.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the external staircase, visible through vertical metal slats, and a small ground-level entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows and a clear view of the flat roof's edge and brickwork.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large glass panels and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass door entry with a small overhang, flush with the facade and no porch
